name: Card File Attachment
description: Attachment preview chips shown in the message compose area. Displays file, contact, photo, or loading states before a message is sent.
assets: 56×56dp rounded rect (r=8dp) — placeholder for media preview

variants.name: Contact
variants.desc: Shows a contact avatar, name, and 'View contact' label. Name color is on-error-container (#8c1d18) when stroke is off, on-surface (#1f1f1f) when stroke is on.

variants.name: Loading
variants.desc: Shows an animated circular progress spinner with a cancel icon, and two skeleton placeholder lines for the file name and size.

variants.name: File
variants.desc: Shows a secondary-colored rounded square with a drive_pdf symbol, file name, and size/type label.

variants.name: File receipt icon
variants.desc: Same as File but the card aligns items to the bottom (items-end) and shows a 16×16dp ReadReceiptIcon at bottom-right (8dp inset). Read receipt status is controllable via the readReceiptStatus prop.

variants.name: File draft
variants.desc: Same as File but the wrapper has position:relative and a 24×24dp remove badge (dark circle + close icon) positioned at top:-12dp right:-4dp.

variants.name: Photos card
variants.desc: Uses 8dp padding (not 16/18dp). Shows a 56×56dp video thumbnail on the left, title and subtitle in the center, and the Google Photos logo in a white circle on the right.

behavior.interactive: Cards are non-interactive display elements in the compose bar. Tapping the card may open a preview (handled by parent). File draft cards include a remove action via the × badge.
behavior.dynamic: The loading spinner animates continuously while the attachment is being processed. The read receipt icon state updates when the message delivery status changes.
behavior.readReceipt: Shown only on File receipt icon variant. Uses the _shared/read-receipt-icon component with mode=Light and status driven by the readReceiptStatus prop.

states: Avatar + name + subtitle. Name color changes with stroke prop.
Animated spinner + cancel icon + skeleton lines.
Icon square + file name + size label.
Icon square + file name + size label + read receipt badge at bottom-right.
Icon square + file name + size label + remove badge at top-right.
Video thumbnail + title + subtitle + Photos logo circle.

darkMode.notes: Dark mode inverts all surface and content tokens. The loading spinner and icon square use the dark secondary token.

writing: Use actual file name with extension, e.g. 'file_name.pdf'
Format as 'XKB · File' or 'X MB · Type'
a11y: Card should announce type + file name, e.g. 'PDF attachment: file_name.pdf'
Inherits content description from ReadReceiptIcon: Sending / Sent / Delivered / Read

conditionalLogic.description: The readReceiptStatus prop is only relevant when type is 'File receipt icon'. The stroke prop applies a border to all types.
